overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic luxury building in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), beginning in a dark neon-lit service corridor and transitioning through a modern hallway into a sunlit indoor atrium with garden and lounge furniture. The footage showcases high-end architectural visualization with dramatic lighting transitions from artificial red neon to natural sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark service corridor with red emergency lighting

events.description: approaching the metal security gate which fills the center of the frame
passing through the vertical barred gate into the brighter hallway beyond

agents.ego_description: moving cautiously through the dark corridor toward the lighted gate at the end

entered.detail: glowing red neon light mounted on the right wall illuminating the corridor
dark rough concrete walls lining both sides of the narrow corridor
vertical barred security gate blocking the corridor ahead
warm yellow light source visible deep in the corridor beyond the gate

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dark, narrow service corridor illuminated by red neon emergency lighting. The camera moves forward toward a metal security gate with vertical bars, passing through it around the 12-second mark to transition into a brighter space beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern office hallway with city views through floor-to-ceiling windows

events.description: emerging from the dark corridor into a space with natural light streaming through large windows
slight leftward turn while passing the modern sofa furniture along the window wall

agents.ego_description: walking along the windowed hallway observing the exterior cityscape visible through the glass

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling glass windows revealing an exterior cityscape with buildings
dark contemporary sofa positioned against the window wall
highly polished dark floor reflecting the overhead lights and windows
large mature tree visible at the end of the hallway marking the entrance to the atrium

segments.scene_description: Having passed through the gate, the scene opens into a modern hallway with floor-to-ceiling windows on the left revealing a cityscape. The lighting shifts from artificial red to mixed natural and artificial light. The camera continues forward past contemporary furniture toward a large tree visible at the corridor's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury indoor atrium garden with lounge seating and skylights

events.description: entering the bright sunlit atrium with wooden decking and indoor garden
slowing down while approaching and circling the central lounge furniture area

agents.ego_description: walking through the sunlit atrium and approaching the central lounge seating area, observing the indoor garden

entered.detail: warm-toned wooden plank flooring covering the atrium ground level
glass ceiling panels allowing bright natural sunlight to flood the space
curved sectional sofa and chairs arranged around a central coffee table
simple wooden bench positioned near the large planter
transparent glass safety railing along the edge of the deck

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals a stunning indoor atrium bathed in natural sunlight from overhead skylights. The space features wooden decking, a large central tree, and modern lounge furniture arranged for relaxation. The camera slows to explore the area, circling the furniture while showcasing the lush indoor garden and architectural glass elements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, neon-lit service area into a sprawling, sun-drenched luxury atrium. It begins in a dark, narrow corridor illuminated by red emergency lighting, moving forward until it passes through a metal security gate. As the camera emerges from the gate, the environment shifts into a modern hallway where the artificial red glow gives way to mixed natural light streaming through floor-to-ceiling windows that reveal a distant cityscape. The scene then opens further as the camera advances past contemporary furniture toward a large tree, finally entering a stunning indoor atrium bathed in bright sunlight from overhead skylights. The movement slows to explore the lush indoor garden, circling modern lounge furniture and wooden decking amidst architectural glass elements.
